rationale.D1: Confirmed library-grade: generic ServoMotorSubsystem<T extends MotorInputsAutoLogged, U extends MotorIO> in com.team254.lib.subsystems reused across elevator, claw, indexer, intake-roller, climber-roller, wrist; TalonFXIO (hardware) and SimTalonFXIO (DCMotorSim-backed) are the two swappable MotorIO impls; per-subsystem sensor IOs (ClawSensorIO, ElevatorSensorIO, ClimberSensorIO, IndexerSensorIO) each have Hardware+Sim pairs; DriveIO and VisionIO likewise have Hardware+Sim impls — this is a true parameterized library reused, not repeated.
rationale.D2: Confirmed search/graph-based coordination: SuperstructureStateMachine builds a weighted state graph of SuperstructureState nodes, calls AStarSolver (custom A* implementation in AStarSolver.java) to find least-cost paths, precomputes all pairwise paths at startup, and reads dynamic transition costs from a deployed file — transition logic is data, not hard-coded conditionals.
rationale.D3: Confirmed whole-robot sim: MapleSimSwerveDrivetrain (org.ironmaple.simulation.drivesims.SwerveDriveSimulation) for drivetrain physics; SimTalonFXIO uses WPILib DCMotorSim for mechanism physics wired per subsystem; VisionIOSimPhoton for camera sim; SimulatedRobotState tracks game-piece state (CoralState, AlgaeState, ClimberState) with IntakeSimulation and ReefscapeCoralOnFly — discounted replay-as-primary-verification because kIsReplay=false is the default and no replay IO variants exist.
rationale.D4: Confirmed zero tests: no src/test directory exists in the repository; the mechanical pass reported 8 hal_harness hits which are Robot.java HAL constants, not test harness usage.
rationale.D5: Confirmed AdvantageKit with replay: Robot extends LoggedRobot; WPILOGWriter active on real robot; kIsReplay flag wires WPILOGReader + WPILOGWriter for replay; Logger.processInputs called in every subsystem via ServoMotorSubsystem.periodic() base class; Logger.recordOutput pervasive throughout; AdvantageScope layouts committed in layouts/ directory — full L4 with replay infrastructure wired.
rationale.D6: Confirmed reactive/on-the-fly planning: no pre-authored .path/.auto files; PathfindingAutoAlignCommand uses PathPlannerLib navgrid-based pathfinding (auto_navgrid.json, navgrid.json deployed) to dynamically compute paths to reef scoring poses at runtime; PathfindingAuto builds entire auto sequences from on-the-fly pathfinding calls; superstructure states are exposed as auto actions — discounted Choreo because choreo reference in index hits are in lib/pathplanner library comments, not actual .traj files driven.
rationale.D7: Confirmed world model as architecture: RobotState owns pose via ConcurrentTimeInterpolatableBuffer<Pose2d>; VisionSubsystem uses VisionIO interface with VisionIOHardwareLimelight and VisionIOSimPhoton impls; inverse-variance-weighted multi-estimate fusion and std-dev tuning confirmed in VisionSubsystem.fuseEstimates(); addVisionMeasurement wired in DriveIOHardware and called from RobotContainer — all four D7 L4 indicators present.
rationale.D8: Confirmed: real 162-line README with setup/build/deploy/sim instructions; clean frc2025 vs lib package split in-tree with spotless formatter (com.diffplug.spotless 6.22.0) configured in build.gradle; discounted CI because no .github/workflows directory exists in the repo; discounted library-as-dependency because com.team254.lib is bundled in-tree, not consumed as a versioned artifact.
